privileged_info_summary: The task targets a synthetic Moodle course 'Introduction to Physics' (shortname PHYS101) with 5 topic sections. The metadata correctly specifies 5 sections with required keywords: (1) Classical Mechanics with Newton's laws and kinematics; (2) Thermodynamics with heat and energy content; (3) Waves and Optics with wave phenomena and optical instruments; (4) Electricity and Magnetism with electric fields and electromagnetic induction; (5) Final Exam Review with practice materials, hidden from students. All specified keywords align with both the task description and standard introductory physics curricula. The course and section structure is created synthetically during task setup via PHP scripts that populate Moodle's database.
